name: Sales Nav Batch Scraper
description: Per-page diagnostic logging to a hardcoded __logs tab (raw count, after-dedup, ms-extract, tabVisible, retry path) so we can diagnose lead-skipping without colleague logs. UI trim: removed redundant step eyebrows + idle Standby badge. Apps Script: 'Ortus Tools' menu adds Delete-all-other-tabs + Clear-log-tab. Headers updated: First Phone Validation, Secondary Emails, Ortus Membership, Premium Account, Linkedin First Connections, Additional email addresses (blank).
